title: GTA 6 Official Release Date Confirmed for May 2026
summary: Rockstar Games has officially confirmed the release date for Grand Theft Auto VI, marking the most anticipated launch in gaming history.
content:
After years of speculation and anticipation, Rockstar Games has finally confirmed the official release date for Grand Theft Auto VI. The game is set to launch on November 16, 2026, exclusively on PlayStation 5 and Xbox Series X|S at launch.

The announcement came alongside a new trailer showcasing the vibrant streets of Vice City and the sprawling Leonida countryside. Players will step into the shoes of Lucia, the franchise's first female protagonist, navigating a world of crime, ambition, and survival in a modern-day Vice City.

Pre-orders are now live across all major retailers, with special editions including exclusive in-game content and physical collectibles.
author: The GTA Vault

title: Vice City Map Breakdown: Every District Revealed
summary: A comprehensive look at every confirmed district in GTA 6's reimagined Vice City, from Ocean Beach to Little Havana.
content:
The GTA 6 map is shaping up to be the most detailed open world Rockstar has ever created. Based on trailer analysis and official reveals, we've identified at least 12 distinct districts across Vice City and the wider Leonida state.

Key areas include the neon-drenched Ocean Beach, the gritty streets of Little Havana, the upscale Star Island, and the expansive Everglades wilderness. Each area features unique architecture, NPC behaviors, and mission opportunities.
author: The GTA Vault

title: Over 200 Vehicles Confirmed for GTA 6 Launch
summary: A massive vehicle roster has been revealed, including boats, planes, motorcycles, and classic Vice City rides.
content:
Industry insiders and dataminers have uncovered a staggering list of over 200 vehicles set to be available at launch in GTA 6. The roster includes everything from sleek supercars to rugged off-road trucks, vintage muscle cars to high-speed boats.

Notable additions include the Pegassi Infernus Classic, a reimagined version of the iconic Vice City supercar, and the Buckingham Luxor Deluxe, a private jet that can be customized at in-game hangars.
author: The GTA Vault

title: GTA 6 Online: First Details on Multiplayer Features
summary: Rockstar teases a revamped GTA Online experience with new heist mechanics, property management, and social hubs.
content:
Rockstar Games has begun teasing the next evolution of GTA Online, set to launch alongside GTA 6. The new online experience will feature entirely new heist mechanics that allow up to 6 players to coordinate complex multi-stage robberies across Vice City.

A new Property Empire system will let players buy, renovate, and manage businesses ranging from nightclubs to car dealerships. Social hubs on the beach and in downtown clubs will serve as meeting points with dynamic events.
author: The GTA Vault

title: GTA 6 Soundtrack: 10 Radio Stations and 500+ Songs
summary: The most ambitious GTA soundtrack ever features Latin beats, synthwave, hip-hop, and a curated Vice City vibe.
content:
Rockstar has partnered with major record labels to deliver the most diverse and expansive soundtrack in GTA history. GTA 6 will feature 10 unique radio stations with over 500 licensed tracks spanning genres from reggaeton and Latin pop to synthwave and modern hip-hop.

Fan-favorite station Flash FM returns with an all-new lineup, while the brand-new Leonida Nights station will feature exclusive tracks from emerging artists.
author: The GTA Vault

title: GTA 6 Pre-Order Guide: Editions, Bonuses & Where to Buy
summary: Everything you need to know about pre-ordering GTA 6, including edition comparisons and retailer exclusives.
content:
GTA 6 is available for pre-order in three editions: Standard ($69.99), Deluxe ($89.99), and Collector's Edition ($149.99). Each edition includes progressively more in-game content and physical collectibles.

The Collector's Edition features a Vice City art book, a collectible map poster, and exclusive online content including a custom vehicle wrap and apartment.
author: The GTA Vault

title: Trailer 2 Breakdown: 5 Hidden Details You Missed
summary: We dissect the latest GTA 6 trailer frame by frame to uncover hidden mechanics and returning characters.
content:
Rockstar's second trailer for GTA 6 broke the internet, but beyond the flashy visuals, there are several hidden details that hint at deeper gameplay mechanics.

We spotted the return of the classic Blista Compact, subtle hints at a dynamic weight system similar to Red Dead Redemption 2, and a brief glimpse of a character who looks suspiciously like a returning favorite from GTA IV.
author: The GTA Vault
